page: Amazon Web Services i7ie.xlarge is a storage-optimized instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 4 dedicated vCPUs derived from 2 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8559C processor running at 3.6 GHz. The CPU includes a 320 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel AMX (Advanced Matrix Extensions). The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 6 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

For high-throughput data requirements, the i7ie.xlarge bundles 2500 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. This high-density local storage is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. The instance does not include any GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark results indicate strong single-threaded performance, with Geekbench single-core and text processing scores reaching the top 10% tier. Single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression also show strong performance in the top 25% tier. However, multi-core performance is more constrained, with stress-ng multi-core and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression falling into the bottom 25% tier. Given the high local NVMe capacity, 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, and strong single-core capabilities, this instance is well-suited for storage-heavy workloads, database operations, and localized data processing.
description: Amazon Web Services i7ie.xlarge is a storage-optimized instance featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 8559C processor running at 3.6 GHz, paired with 32.0 GB of DDR5 memory. Built on the Nitro hypervisor, it includes a substantial 2500 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show top-tier single-core execution, particularly in text processing and single-threaded compression, though multi-core scaling and memory read bandwidth are comparatively weak. The hardware configuration provides a high resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core alongside extensive local storage, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient choice for database operations, localized data processing, and storage-intensive applications that do not require GPU acceleration or highly parallelized multi-core compute.
og_description: Amazon Web Services i7ie.xlarge is a storage-optimized instance featuring 4 vCPUs, 32 GB DDR5 RAM, and 2500 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, delivering strong single-core performance for database workloads.

tagline: A storage-optimized instance combining 2500 GB of local NVMe SSD storage with strong single-core performance and DDR5 memory.
bullet_points: 4 dedicated vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 8559C processor at 3.6 GHz
32.0 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory with 8.0 GB per core
2500 GB of bundled local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier single-core performance in text processing and compression benchmarks
Best suited for database operations and storage-intensive workloads
